briefdescription.para: This function is class handler for Mass storage and is called when Setup packet received is for Class request(not Standard Device request)
This function handles Reduced Block Command (RBC) requests from the host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to send SCSI Command Status Wrapper to Host.
This file contains definitions used in the Mass Storage class code.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.4 BK 12/01/18 Renamed the file and added changes to have a common example for all USB IPs.
